textByHash.ac049422952512e92a56c1432c3de2c3b043fe03: Sophia Hughes. You have called upon me. Those that oppose you will be judged in the name of Yama.
textByHash.2f38c22b0433f4786ce86ecd423fe83ef75d7895: But know this, Sophia Hughes. Those that call upon the Judge must first be judged themselves.
textByHash.8569e8818d3b6cc70c5cb3e791088b6dcad60e20: You have betrayed the trust of Yama, Sophia Hughes. You have used his generosity to your own advantage. For this, your life is forfeit.
textByHash.b7a24dd69f565082a5e1547d375a9fa9829fe7a8: Come. Serve your master one last time. Bathe yourself in a sea of fire. Bathe yourself in a sea of blood.
